    arxiv-daily

    Automated deployment @ 2025-04-11 21:25:21 Asia/Shanghai

    Welcome to contribute! Add your topics and keywords in topic.yml. You can also view historical data through the storage.

    Embodied Intelligence

    Embodied Cognition

    Publish Date Title Authors PDF Code
    2025-04-10 Echo: An Open-Source, Low-Cost Teleoperation System with Force Feedback for Dataset Collection in Robot Learning Artem Bazhenov et.al. 2504.07939v1 null
    2025-04-10 Fast Adaptation with Behavioral Foundation Models Harshit Sikchi et.al. 2504.07896v1 null
    2025-04-10 Experimental Analysis of Quadcopter Drone Hover Constraints for Localization Improvements Uthman Olawoye et.al. 2504.07843v1 null
    2025-04-10 Cable Optimization and Drag Estimation for Tether-Powered Multirotor UAVs Max Beffert et.al. 2504.07802v1 null
    2025-04-10 TOCALib: Optimal control library with interpolation for bimanual manipulation and obstacles avoidance Yulia Danik et.al. 2504.07708v1 null
    2025-04-10 Transformer-Based Robust Underwater Inertial Navigation in Prolonged Doppler Velocity Log Outages Zeev Yampolsky et.al. 2504.07697v1 null
    2025-04-10 Sim-to-Real Transfer in Reinforcement Learning for Maneuver Control of a Variable-Pitch MAV Zhikun Wang et.al. 2504.07694v1 null
    2025-04-10 Localization Meets Uncertainty: Uncertainty-Aware Multi-Modal Localization Hye-Min Won et.al. 2504.07677v1 null
    2025-04-10 UWB Anchor Based Localization of a Planetary Rover Andreas Nüchter et.al. 2504.07658v1 null
    2025-04-10 Joint Travel Route Optimization Framework for Platooning Akif Adas et.al. 2504.07623v1 null
    2025-04-10 Learning Long Short-Term Intention within Human Daily Behaviors Zhe Sun et.al. 2504.07597v1 null
    2025-04-10 Efficient Swept Volume-Based Trajectory Generation for Arbitrary-Shaped Ground Robot Navigation Yisheng Li et.al. 2504.07554v1 null
    2025-04-10 Drive in Corridors: Enhancing the Safety of End-to-end Autonomous Driving via Corridor Learning and Planning Zhiwei Zhang et.al. 2504.07507v1 null
    2025-04-10 Program Skeletons for Automated Program Translation Bo Wang et.al. 2504.07483v1 null
    2025-04-10 Personalized and Demand-Based Education Concept: Practical Tools for Control Engineers Balint Varga et.al. 2504.07466v1 null
    2025-04-10 Enhanced Question-Answering for Skill-based learning using Knowledge-based AI and Generative AI Rahul K. Dass et.al. 2504.07463v1 null
    2025-04-10 ThermoStereoRT: Thermal Stereo Matching in Real Time via Knowledge Distillation and Attention-based Refinement Anning Hu et.al. 2504.07418v1 null
    2025-04-10 Novel Diffusion Models for Multimodal 3D Hand Trajectory Prediction Junyi Ma et.al. 2504.07375v1 null
    2025-04-10 Orientational ordering in active nematic solids Haiqian Yang et.al. 2504.07354v1 null
    2025-04-09 Capturing the Demon in Szilard's Engine Xiangjun Xing et.al. 2504.07331v1 null
    2025-04-09 Adaptive Vision-Guided Robotic Arm Control for Precision Pruning in Dynamic Orchard Environments Dawood Ahmed et.al. 2504.07309v1 null
    2025-04-09 Data-Enabled Neighboring Extremal: Case Study on Model-Free Trajectory Tracking for Robotic Arm Amin Vahidi-Moghaddam et.al. 2504.07292v1 null
    2025-04-09 Bridging Deep Reinforcement Learning and Motion Planning for Model-Free Navigation in Cluttered Environments Licheng Luo et.al. 2504.07283v1 null
    2025-04-09 Expectations, Explanations, and Embodiment: Attempts at Robot Failure Recovery Elmira Yadollahi et.al. 2504.07266v1 null
    2025-04-09 Analysis of the Unscented Transform for Cooperative Localization with Ranging-Only Information Uthman Olawoye et.al. 2504.07242v1 null
    2025-04-09 A Pointcloud Registration Framework for Relocalization in Subterranean Environments David Akhihiero et.al. 2504.07231v1 null
    2025-04-09 Neural Motion Simulator: Pushing the Limit of World Models in Reinforcement Learning Chenjie Hao et.al. 2504.07095v1 null
    2025-04-09 FlashDepth: Real-time Streaming Video Depth Estimation at 2K Resolution Gene Chou et.al. 2504.07093v1 null
